source_expectation.quality_estimate_target: 8/10 or better intake for clothing refinement with an existing base avatar scene

refinement_checklist: Run raw asset audit before fit work.
Select the clothing refinement wrapper that matches the current base avatar blend workflow.
Generate a cleaned blend output plus scene-state and preview artifacts.
Verify deformation behavior before marking the asset validated.
validation_checklist: Preview render or scene-state evidence exists.
Manual gate notes cover Unity registry wiring and target-machine Blender execution.
manual_gate_notes: Current implementation supports clothing-foundation refinement wrappers but still depends on target-machine Blender execution.
Unity runtime wardrobe handoff registry intake now exists, but bridge-driven live equip mapping still remains planned work.
